item.name: Heritage Loach
item.description:
Located in Heritage Found, this highly adaptive species has survived countless catastrophes over the years.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: This lithe, slender wavekin has long been beloved by the inhabitants of Heritage Found. Capable of readily adapting to even the most severe environmental changes, it has survived numerous calamities in which other, less hardy species have perished.
